reviews.comment:
Buena....para cargar combustible suele haber cola de 25 minutos aproximadamente...dado que es ypf (mas económico que Shell) tambien se puede hacer cambio de aceite y filtro, (precio justo)

(Translated by Google)
Good...to fill up with fuel there is usually a line of approximately 25 minutes...since it is YPF (cheaper than Shell) you can also change the oil and filter (fair price)

reviews.comment:
Atienden muy bien, tiene compresor de aire, un mercadito, y podés encontrarte con una larga fila intentando cargar combustible también.

(Translated by Google)
They provide excellent service, have an air compressor, a small market, and you might also find a long line trying to refuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneVllaE5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños sucios, sin nada para higienizar las manos. Empleados del YPF FULL más atentos al celular y a visitas de amistades personales que a la atención. El peor ACA que he conocido.

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms, with nothing to sanitize your hands. YPF FULL employees more focused on their cell phones and visits from personal friends than on customer service. The worst ACA I've ever been to.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3a196TmpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención está bien. Casi siempre tienen hielo y el kiosco 24 hs. te salva en más de una. Tiene baño público. A veces se quedan sin nafta super (la regular).
El gran problema que tiene es que hay colas de más de 20 minutos para cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good. They almost always have ice, and the 24-hour kiosk is a lifesaver. There's a public restroom. Sometimes they run out of super (regular) gas.
The big problem is that there are lines that last more than 20 minutes to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3cTdLcGtnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service but they need more staff.
